name: Meta Platforms
confidenceReason: Cheapest Mag 7 stock at PEG 1.05 with 22-26% revenue growth. 82% gross margin, 40-43% operating margins. Massive buybacks (~1.5% annual share reduction).
bullCase: PEG of 1.05 suggests fair pricing for growth. AI-driven ad targeting improvements are accelerating revenue. WhatsApp monetization is still early. Massive buyback program supports EPS growth. Among the cheapest of the Mag 7.
bearCase: Enormous CapEx on AI ($66-72B guidance) compresses FCF. Regulatory risk (antitrust, content moderation). Reality Labs remains a cash incinerator. If ad spending slows in a recession, revenue growth decelerates sharply.

cagrModel.basis: Balanced high AI CapEx intensity with successful monetization of WhatsApp/AI.

description: Meta Platforms, Inc. engages in the development of products that enable people to connect and share with friends and family through mobile devices, personal computers, virtual reality (VR) headsets...
